# SEC fixture provenance

These fixtures preserve the public SEC `company_tickers_exchange.json` and
`data.sec.gov/submissions/CIK##########.json` response shapes used by the
read-only adapter.

All issuer names, CIKs, tickers, accession numbers, file numbers, filing
timestamps, documents, and numeric values are synthetic. No request header,
contact email, credential, or live response is stored here.
